text.value: SELECT 'coverage' AS table_name, COUNT(*) AS row_count, SUM(CASE WHEN coverage_id IS NULL OR TRIM(coverage_id) = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS null_pk, CASE WHEN COUNT(*) = 0 THEN 'FAIL' WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN coverage_id IS NULL OR TRIM(coverage_id) = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 THEN 'FAIL' ELSE 'PASS' END AS check_status FROM OPENROWSET(BULK 'silver/coverage/*.parquet', DATA_SOURCE = 'gold_adls', FORMAT = 'PARQUET') WITH (coverage_id VARCHAR(10)) AS raw;

INSERT INTO <CONTROL_SCHEMA>.pipeline_validation_log (pipeline_run_id, layer, table_name, check_name, check_status, actual_value, error_message) VALUES ('coverage_gold_validation_failed','GOLD','dim_coverage','Silver Validation','FAIL','check_status = FAIL','Silver coverage validation failed — Gold transformation skipped');
